# mahiro-skills skill index

Use this file as a compact discovery map. Runtime bundle membership still comes from `../.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`; this index is for humans and agents deciding which skill to load.

## Skills

- `asset-designer` — Asset director for production-ready website image assets and manifests. Trigger on: cutout/background removal, layer separation, transparent PNG packs, missing web assets, asset QA/delivery notes.
- `deep-research` — Deep research via Gemini. Trigger on: comprehensive research, source-backed analysis, deep dive, web-backed synthesis.
- `direct-cli` — Direct executor playbook for Gemini CLI and Cursor CLI through fresh tmux sessions. Trigger on: direct Gemini lane, direct Cursor lane, tmux pane, fresh CLI session, yolo/offloaded executor lane.
- `forward` — Handoff and planning bridge for the next session. Trigger on: wrap up, handoff, forward this work, next session plan.
- `gemini` — Control Gemini via MQTT WebSocket. Trigger on: Gemini tab automation, send message to Gemini, browser Gemini workflow, MQTT bridge.
- `learn` — Explore a codebase with parallel agents. Trigger on: learn repo, study codebase, explore repository, GitHub URL for study.
- `mahiro-docs-rules-init` — Bootstrap AGENTS.md and a Mahiro-style docs family. Trigger on: initialize repo rules, create AGENTS.md, bootstrap project docs, under-documented repo.
- `mahiro-style` — Mahiro cross-repo code style doctrine. Trigger on: align to Mahiro style, review code shape, refactor style, naming/file structure/i18n boundaries.
- `philosophy` — Display local philosophy and alignment rules. Trigger on: principles, philosophy check, alignment rules, how should we think about this.
- `project` — Clone and track external repos for study or development. Trigger on: project learn, project incubate, find tracked repo, list tracked projects, ghq symlink tracking.
- `recap` — Session orientation and awareness. Trigger on: recap, status now, resume context, what happened today, current focus.
- `rrr` — Session retrospective with lessons learned. Trigger on: retrospective, end of session, lessons learned, durable memory note.
- `uncodixify` — Doctrine-first frontend taste and UI calibration filter that prevents generic AI/Codex output. Trigger on: frontend UI generation/review, reference leakage, AI-looking layouts, fake-premium SaaS polish, unsupported motion/filler UI.
- `web-asset-prompts` — Per-asset prompt writer for production-ready website image assets. Trigger on: transparent cutouts, chroma-key sources, overlay-safe hero/card images, aspect ratios, crop-safe web-ready prompts.
- `watch` — Learn from YouTube videos via Gemini transcription. Trigger on: watch this video, transcribe YouTube, summarize video, learn from a talk.

## Common bundles

- **Orientation bundle**: `recap`, `rrr`, `forward`
- **Project tracking bundle**: `project`, `learn`
- **Direct execution bundle**: `direct-cli`, `gemini`, `deep-research`, `watch`
- **Repo doctrine bundle**: `mahiro-style`, `mahiro-docs-rules-init`, `philosophy`
- **Frontend taste bundle**: `uncodixify`, `web-asset-prompts`, `asset-designer`

## Install examples

```bash
bun ./src/cli.ts install recap rrr forward --agent opencode --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install project learn --agent cursor,gemini --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install uncodixify web-asset-prompts asset-designer --agent opencode --scope local
bun ./src/cli.ts install --agent opencode --scope global
```
